scripts.generate-grpc: grpc_tools_node_protoc --grpc_out=grpc_js:generated --js_out=import_style=commonjs,binary:generated -I ../proto ../proto/ddd/v1/*.proto && echo 'Generated gRPC stubs in bff/generated/'
scripts.generate-grpc:watch: npm run generate-grpc && node --watch 'npm run generate-grpc' ../proto 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.postgenerate-grpc: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path='generated/ddd/v1';fs.mkdirSync(path,{recursive:true});const files=['analysis_pb2.js','analysis_pb2_grpc.js'];files.forEach(f=>{const p=path+'/'+f;if(!fs.existsSync(p))console.warn('WARNING: missing '+p);else console.log('OK: '+p)});console.log('gRPC stub generation complete.');"
